requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Testing for Lithium Battery Cells and Modules in BESS
requirement_topic.zh: BESS锂电池芯与模组的UN 38.3运输测试
requirement_topic.zht: BESS鋰電池芯與模組的UN 38.3運輸測試

summary.en: Lithium battery cells, modules, and BESS battery packs shipped internationally must comply with UN 38.3 (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3) to demonstrate safe transportation as Class 9 dangerous goods. UN 38.3 test evidence (altitude simulation, thermal test, vibration, shock, external short circuit, impact, overcharge, forced discharge) is required by international air (IATA DGR), sea (IMDG Code), and road carriers for each cell design and each pack configuration. Morocco's customs authority (ADII) and port of entry (Casablanca or Tangier) apply IMDG Code requirements for sea shipment of lithium batteries.
summary.zh: 国际运输的锂电池芯、模组和BESS电池包须符合UN 38.3（联合国危险货物测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节），以证明其作为第9类危险货物的运输安全性。国际航空（IATA DGR）、海运（IMDG公约）和公路承运人要求每种电芯设计和电池包配置提供UN 38.3测试证据（高空模拟、热测试、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击、过充、强制放电）。摩洛哥海关（ADII）和入境港口（卡萨布兰卡或丹吉尔）对锂电池海运适用IMDG公约要求。
summary.zht: 國際運輸的鋰電池芯、模組和BESS電池包須符合UN 38.3（聯合國危險貨物測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節），以證明其作為第9類危險貨物的運輸安全性。國際航空（IATA DGR）、海運（IMDG公約）和公路承運人要求每種電芯設計和電池包配置提供UN 38.3測試證據（高空模擬、熱測試、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊、過充、強制放電）。摩洛哥海關（ADII）和入境港口（卡薩布蘭卡或丹吉爾）對鋰電池海運適用IMDG公約要求。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3, 8th revised edition)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) — Special Provision 188 / 384 for lithium batteries
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — Section II and Section IB for lithium battery shipments
Moroccan customs regulations for dangerous goods import (ADII)

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test evidence for international export shipments of lithium batteries and BESS components as part of CNCA export controls and customs dangerous-goods declarations. Chinese manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test summary sheets from accredited laboratories. These same UN 38.3 documents are accepted internationally, including for Morocco, provided they cover the exact cell or pack design being shipped and the summary sheet is in the required format.
summary.zh: 中国要求锂电池和BESS部件国际出口运输时提供UN 38.3测试证据，作为CNCA出口管制和海关危险货物申报的一部分。中国制造商通常持有认可实验室出具的UN 38.3测试摘要表。上述UN 38.3文件在国际上被接受，包括对摩洛哥，前提是其覆盖所发运的具体电芯或电池包设计，且摘要表格式符合要求。
summary.zht: 中國要求鋰電池和BESS部件國際出口運輸時提供UN 38.3測試證據，作為CNCA出口管制和海關危險貨物申報的一部分。中國製造商通常持有認可實驗室出具的UN 38.3測試摘要表。上述UN 38.3文件在國際上被接受，包括對摩洛哥，前提是其覆蓋所發運的具體電芯或電池包設計，且摘要表格式符合要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28164 (China transport test standard for lithium batteries — aligned with UN 38.3)

gap.en: UN 38.3 is an international standard used for Morocco as for any export market. The key action is to verify that the UN 38.3 test summary sheet covers the exact cell chemistry, form factor, and capacity of the cells in the BESS being shipped, and that a current test summary (not more than one product generation old) is available. For new cell designs or pack configurations, commission a fresh UN 38.3 test before the first export shipment. Prepare IMDG packing group, SDS, and emergency response card for the sea shipment to Morocco.
gap.zh: UN 38.3是国际标准，与其他出口市场一样适用于摩洛哥。关键事项是核验UN 38.3测试摘要表覆盖所发运BESS中电芯的具体化学体系、形状和容量，且现行测试摘要（不超过一代产品前）可用。对于新电芯设计或电池包配置，应在首次出口发货前委托全新UN 38.3测试。应为赴摩洛哥海运准备IMDG包装组别、SDS和应急响应卡。
gap.zht: UN 38.3是國際標準，與其他出口市場一樣適用於摩洛哥。關鍵事項是核驗UN 38.3測試摘要表覆蓋所發運BESS中電芯的具體化學體系、形狀和容量，且現行測試摘要（不超過一代產品前）可用。對於新電芯設計或電池包配置，應在首次出口發貨前委託全新UN 38.3測試。應為赴摩洛哥海運準備IMDG包裝組別、SDS和應急響應卡。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under IMDG Code for sea shipment of lithium batteries and BESS components to Morocco; mandatory under IATA DGR for air freight if applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese international export shipments of lithium batteries under CNCA and customs rules; UN 38.3 is the same international standard

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 test evidence is the same international requirement for Morocco as for any market. Verify that existing UN 38.3 summary sheets cover the exact cell design and pack configuration being exported, and prepare full IMDG dangerous-goods documentation for sea freight to Casablanca or Tangier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3测试证据适用于摩洛哥，与任何市场相同。核验现有UN 38.3摘要表覆盖所出口的具体电芯设计和电池包配置，并为赴卡萨布兰卡或丹吉尔的海运准备完整的IMDG危险货物文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3測試證據適用於摩洛哥，與任何市場相同。核驗現有UN 38.3摘要表覆蓋所出口的具體電芯設計和電池包配置，並為赴卡薩布蘭卡或丹吉爾的海運準備完整的IMDG危險貨物文件。
